title: Cyclone Alfred makes landfall on Queensland coast
connection: Tropical cyclones are powerful examples of extreme weather systems - how they form over warm ocean water and the devastation they cause when they hit land.

title: Great Barrier Reef records third mass bleaching event in five years
connection: Ocean warming and acidification are pushing coral ecosystems to their limits - a direct connection to our Oceanography unit and SDG 14.

title: Pacific Island nations call for stronger emissions commitments at UN summit
connection: Australia's neighbours in the Pacific face existential threats from sea level rise - this connects directly to our Australia's Neighbours unit and global citizenship.

title: Australia's food exports reach record high despite drought in key regions
connection: Primary production under climate pressure - how Australia feeds the world while managing increasingly unreliable rainfall patterns.
